data.name: Hush Hush - Only Your Love Can Save Them
data.detailed_description:
Featuring the cast of the hit game "Crush Crush", Hush hush is a branching visual novel where you need to juggle a schedule and multiple lovers to save them from a gruesome fate.

The story of Hush Hush centers around five girls that the player must date, impress, and ultimately make fall in love with them. Each girl is hiding a potentially dangerous secret that the player will need to discover and find a way to address / solve.

Hush Hush’s story centers around adult interactions, and will explore some intense narrative and interpersonal relationships.
data.about_the_game:
Featuring the cast of the hit game "Crush Crush", Hush hush is a branching visual novel where you need to juggle a schedule and multiple lovers to save them from a gruesome fate.

The story of Hush Hush centers around five girls that the player must date, impress, and ultimately make fall in love with them. Each girl is hiding a potentially dangerous secret that the player will need to discover and find a way to address / solve.

Hush Hush’s story centers around adult interactions, and will explore some intense narrative and interpersonal relationships.
data.short_description: A Visual Novel with a twist - improve skills, charm girls, and learn dangerous secrets... by any means necessary.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1, Windows 8.1, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD CPU 1.6GHz+ with SSE2
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia, AMD or Intel Graphics with support for DirectX 10 (Shader Model 4.0)
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: N/A
  • 備註: N/A

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.9+
  • 處理器: Intel 1.6GHz+ with SSE2
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia, AMD or Intel Graphics with support for OpenGL 4
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: N/A
  • 備註: N/A

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 14.04+ or SteamOS
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD CPU 1.6GHz+ with SSE2
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia, AMD or Intel Graphics with support for OpenGL 4
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: N/A
  • 備註: N/A
